rejection_reason: compliance: email_require_personalization — email body contains no personalization token ({{first_name}}, {{company}}, or {{recipient}}). Every outreach email must reference the recipient by name or company. Generic openers are not permitted.
text:
Subject: Saving your sales team 2 hours a day

Hi there,

I noticed your company recently expanded its sales team, which usually means onboarding and ramp time become a bigger challenge.

FlowAI helps sales teams save an average of 2 hours per day by automating the repetitive work that slows reps down.

Would it be worth a 15-minute call to see if we can help?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
